active_planning_focus: Resolve dashboard benchmark blocker questions before lock
last_planning_summary: The vague internal dashboard request has been captured as pre-runtime planning state. Readiness remains blocked until the primary user, needs-attention signals, allowed source systems, privacy/access constraints, and planning-meeting evidence are answered.

pending_questions.title: Who exactly is the primary dashboard user, and what decision should the dashboard support?
What does needs attention mean in observable account signals?
Which source systems, account fields, freshness rules, privacy constraints, and access controls may v0 use?
What acceptance evidence must be ready for the next planning meeting?

recent_decisions.title: Treat the dashboard request as planning evidence, not build scope.
Use the benchmark workspace only for ni CLI readiness proof.

recent_risks.title: A downstream actor could build around guessed users, metrics, charts, deadlines, and success criteria.
Customer account signals could be exposed to the wrong audience if the privacy and access-control boundary is guessed.
Account prioritization could be incorrect or stale if needs-attention signals are undefined.

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
